end end end end end e=#j return N(a)end,function(r,Z)local N=P(Z)local t=function(t,w,j,X,a)return e(r,{t;w;j,X;a},Z,N)end return t end,function(r,Z)local N=P(Z)local t=function()return e(r,{},Z,N)end return t end,function(r)local Z,e=-202312-(-202313),r[-94681-(-94682)]while e do s[e],Z=s[e]-(455588-455587),Z+(572333+-572332)if s[e]==-1026209-(-1026209)then s[e],p[e]=nil,nil end e=r[Z]end end,function(r,Z)local N=P(Z)local t=function(t,w)return e(r,{t;w},Z,N)end return t end,{},function(r,Z)local N=P(Z)local t=function(t,w,j)return e(r,{t;w;j},Z,N)end return t end,function(r,Z)local N=P(Z)local t=function(t)return e(r,{t},Z,N)end return t end,function(r,Z)local N=P(Z)local t=function(t,w,j,X,a,p)return e(r,{t;w;j,X;a,p},Z,N)end return t end return(W(-343073+7613146,{}))(N(a))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[Z(217265-219381)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
